1.text:
PROFILE SUMMARY
Forward-thinking Generative AI & Full Stack Engineer with strong expertise in building scalable Multi-Agent Systems and RAG architectures. Currently specializing in the IIT Mandi GenAI curriculum, focusing on LLM orchestration, fine-tuning and agentic workflows using LangChain and CrewAI. Proven track record of integrating AI-driven automation into enterprise web applications (MERN/Next.js) to optimize performance and decision-making.

2.text:

•	Delivered automation and AI-driven enhancements across platforms, improving accuracy, reliability, and workflow efficiency. 
•	Built secure Node.js authentication with role-based login, user management (create/delete), and integrated AWS certificate handling. 
•	Improved system scalability and uptime through optimized server load handling, high-performance APIs, and refined backend logic. 
•	Enhanced decision-making by implementing structured analytics dashboards and improving data visibility across departments. 
•	Strengthened platform architecture with modular codebases, reusable components, and improved cross-service data flow.

AI EXPERTISE

PG Certification in Gen AI and Multi-Agent Systems, IIT Mandi - TIH	 Dec 2025 — Present

•	Key Learnings & Deployment: Applied Deep Learning foundations and Transformer architectures to build and deploy scalable GenAI models via FastAPI.

7.text:
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Software Engineer, Kent RO Systems Pvt Ltd 	 Apr 2024 — Present
•	Integrated OCR-based invoice parsing to automate data extraction and validation, reducing manual effort and improving accuracy. 
•	Implemented server load balancing using NGINX, ensuring high availability, optimized traffic distribution, and improved system stability. 
•	Integrated dynamic Zoho Analytics dashboards with role-based and criteria-based filters, enhancing decision-making and data accessibility across departments. 
•	Developed secure authentication and role-based access control using JWT and OAuth2 for internal and external stakeholders. 
•	Improved API performance, optimized backend logic, and strengthened system scalability across the Kent RiseEngine platform. 

Associate Software Developer, TechnoIdentity 	 Aug 2023 — Mar 2024
•	Revamped the HRMS platform using Next.js and TypeScript, improving UI performance and overall user experience. 
•	Developed scalable and reusable UI components for the Hectare (US Toll Authority) platform, enhancing system reliability and maintainability. 
•	Automated end-to-end test cases using Cypress and Playwright, reducing manual QA effort and improving testing efficiency.
7.title: Profile: experience

8.text:
PROJECTS

Kent Risengine, Internal 	 
•	Built an AI-based invoice parser in RiseEngine to automate data extraction and improve processing accuracy. 
•	Created validation schemas, components and UI using React and Node.js to ensure clean, consistent and reliable data. 
•	Integrated Zoho Analytics dashboards with role-based and criteria-based views for real-time insights. 

Cam Attendance, Internal/Client 	 
•	Maintained and enhanced a full-stack attendance platform used by thousands of employees and clients. 
•	Managed backend services and REST APIs (Spring Boot) along with frontend modules (Angular) for real-time HR data tracking. 
•	Integrated automated data pipelines to sync and validate check-ins, leave logs, and key HR metrics. 

TIOS Revamp, Internal 	 
•	Migrated a legacy HRMS to a modern modular architecture using Next.js. 
•	Improved performance, maintainability, and scalability by redesigning the UI/UX and restructuring the entire codebase. 

Scam Guard AI (Open Source/Personal)
•	A cutting-edge AI security platform designed to detect and prevent digital scams in real-time. Built with Gemini and advanced NLP Transformers to analyze text, emails, and URLs for malicious intent.

HireFlow AI (Open Source/Personal)
•	An intelligent AI Resume Search platform using RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architecture. Automates resume parsing, creates vector embeddings for semantic search, and provides recruiters with an ATS-style analytics interface to match candidates instantly.

Portfolio AI (Open Source/Personal)
•	A modern, AI-powered portfolio website featuring a RAG-based chatbot powered by Gemini and Pinecone. Includes an AI resume insights generator, dark mode, 3D visuals, and premium Framer Motion animations.
